name: Intema Insaat ve Tesisat Malzemeleri Yatirim ve Pazarlama A.S.
summary: Intema Insaat ve Tesisat Malzemeleri Yatirim ve Pazarlama A.S. markets and sells building products in Turkey. It offers bathroom sets, bathroom furniture and fixtures, acrylic bathtubs, armature and bathroom accessories, ceramic tiles, shower enclosures, kitchen fixtures, shower systems, mirrors and lighting elements, radiators, and towel dryers, construction chemicals, and complementary products under the Vitra, ARTEMA, INTEMA KITCHEN, VILLEROY & BOCH, and Burgbad brands. The company provides its products through its retail stores, as well as through wholesale channels. Intema Insaat ve Tesisat Malzemeleri Yatirim ve Pazarlama A.S. was founded in 1978 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
